case_title: PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY VS. JASON WONG et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JASON DBA CHAMPION AUTO SHOP DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-05-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-07-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-21-2003
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIG. ADVERTISING CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JASON DBA CHAMPION AUTO SHOP $16,095.99 PRINCIPAL, $1,950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $507.15 INTEREST, $183.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,736.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,261.54 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JASON DBA CHAMPION AUTO SHOP
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $183.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JASON DBA CHAMPION AUTO SHOP
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,356.96 INTEREST, $26.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY
